TestCase.name: testFilterOnArrayColumn
TestCase.Resource: SELECT a, s FROM MyTable, UNNEST(d) AS T(s) WHERE d IS NOT NULL

LogicalProject(a=[$0], s=[$4]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[IS NOT NULL($3)]) +- LogicalCorrelate(correlation=[$cor0], joinType=[inner], requiredColumns=[{3}]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]]) +- LogicalProject(s=[$0]) +- Uncollect +- LogicalProject(d=[$cor0.d]) +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])

Calc(select=[a, d0 AS s]) +- Correlate(invocation=[$UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.d)], correlate=[table($UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.d))], select=[a,d,d0], rowType=[RecordType(INTEGER a, INTEGER ARRAY d, INTEGER d0)], joinType=[INNER]) +- Calc(select=[a, d], where=[IS NOT NULL(d)]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]], fields=[a, b, c, d])

TestCase.name: testInnerUnnestArrayOfRowsAllLeftColumnsUsed
TestCase.Resource: SELECT a, x FROM MyRowArrayTable, UNNEST(b) AS T(x, y)

LogicalProject(a=[$0], x=[$2]) +- LogicalCorrelate(correlation=[$cor0], joinType=[inner], requiredColumns=[{1}]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyRowArrayTable]]) +- LogicalProject(x=[$0], y=[$1]) +- Uncollect +- LogicalProject(b=[$cor0.b]) +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])

Calc(select=[a, _1 AS x]) +- Correlate(invocation=[$UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor0.b)], correlate=[table($UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor0.b))], select=[a,b,_1,_2], rowType=[RecordType(INTEGER a, RecordType:peek_no_expand(INTEGER _1, VARCHAR(2147483647) _2) ARRAY b, INTEGER _1, VARCHAR(2147483647) _2)], joinType=[INNER]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyRowArrayTable]], fields=[a, b])

TestCase.name: testInnerUnnestFilterOnLeftOnly
TestCase.Resource: SELECT a, b, s FROM MyTable, UNNEST(d) AS T(s) WHERE a > 5

LogicalProject(a=[$0], b=[$1], s=[$4]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[>($0, 5)]) +- LogicalCorrelate(correlation=[$cor0], joinType=[inner], requiredColumns=[{3}]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]]) +- LogicalProject(s=[$0]) +- Uncollect +- LogicalProject(d=[$cor0.d]) +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])

Calc(select=[a, b, d0 AS s]) +- Correlate(invocation=[$UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.d)], correlate=[table($UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.d))], select=[a,b,d,d0], rowType=[RecordType(INTEGER a, INTEGER b, INTEGER ARRAY d, INTEGER d0)], joinType=[INNER]) +- Calc(select=[a, b, d], where=[>(a, 5)]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]], fields=[a, b, c, d])

TestCase.name: testInnerUnnestFilterOnRightOnly
TestCase.Resource: SELECT a, b, s FROM MyTable, UNNEST(d) AS T(s) WHERE s < 100

LogicalProject(a=[$0], b=[$1], s=[$4]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[<($4, 100)]) +- LogicalCorrelate(correlation=[$cor0], joinType=[inner], requiredColumns=[{3}]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]]) +- LogicalProject(s=[$0]) +- Uncollect +- LogicalProject(d=[$cor0.d]) +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])

Calc(select=[a, b, d0 AS s]) +- Correlate(invocation=[$UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.d)], correlate=[table($UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.d))], select=[a,b,d,d0], rowType=[RecordType(INTEGER a, INTEGER b, INTEGER ARRAY d, INTEGER d0)], joinType=[INNER], condition=[<($0, 100)]) +- Calc(select=[a, b, d]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]], fields=[a, b, c, d])

TestCase.name: testInnerUnnestMapFilterOnLeftOnly
TestCase.Resource: SELECT a, v FROM MyMapTable, UNNEST(m) AS T(k, v) WHERE a > 5

LogicalProject(a=[$0], v=[$4]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[>($0, 5)]) +- LogicalCorrelate(correlation=[$cor0], joinType=[inner], requiredColumns=[{2}]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyMapTable]]) +- LogicalProject(k=[$0], v=[$1]) +- Uncollect +- LogicalProject(m=[$cor0.m]) +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])

Calc(select=[a, VALUE AS v]) +- Correlate(invocation=[$UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.m)], correlate=[table($UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.m))], select=[a,m,KEY,VALUE], rowType=[RecordType(INTEGER a, (VARCHAR(2147483647), VARCHAR(2147483647)) MAP m, VARCHAR(2147483647) KEY, VARCHAR(2147483647) VALUE)], joinType=[INNER]) +- Calc(select=[a, m], where=[>(a, 5)]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyMapTable]], fields=[a, b, m])

TestCase.name: testInnerUnnestMapProjectionDropsLeftColumns
TestCase.Resource: SELECT a, k, v FROM MyMapTable, UNNEST(m) AS T(k, v)

LogicalProject(a=[$0], k=[$3], v=[$4]) +- LogicalCorrelate(correlation=[$cor0], joinType=[inner], requiredColumns=[{2}]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyMapTable]]) +- LogicalProject(k=[$0], v=[$1]) +- Uncollect +- LogicalProject(m=[$cor0.m]) +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])

Calc(select=[a, KEY AS k, VALUE AS v]) +- Correlate(invocation=[$UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.m)], correlate=[table($UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.m))], select=[a,m,KEY,VALUE], rowType=[RecordType(INTEGER a, (VARCHAR(2147483647), VARCHAR(2147483647)) MAP m, VARCHAR(2147483647) KEY, VARCHAR(2147483647) VALUE)], joinType=[INNER]) +- Calc(select=[a, m]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyMapTable]], fields=[a, b, m])

TestCase.name: testInnerUnnestMixedPredicate
TestCase.Resource: SELECT a, b, s FROM MyTable, UNNEST(d) AS T(s) WHERE a > 5 AND s < 100 AND a + s > 10

LogicalProject(a=[$0], b=[$1], s=[$4]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[AND(>($0, 5), <($4, 100), >(+($0, $4), 10))]) +- LogicalCorrelate(correlation=[$cor0], joinType=[inner], requiredColumns=[{3}]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]]) +- LogicalProject(s=[$0]) +- Uncollect +- LogicalProject(d=[$cor0.d]) +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])

Calc(select=[a, b, d0 AS s], where=[>(+(a, d0), 10)]) +- Correlate(invocation=[$UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.d)], correlate=[table($UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.d))], select=[a,b,d,d0], rowType=[RecordType(INTEGER a, INTEGER b, INTEGER ARRAY d, INTEGER d0)], joinType=[INNER], condition=[<($0, 100)]) +- Calc(select=[a, b, d], where=[>(a, 5)]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]], fields=[a, b, c, d])

TestCase.name: testInnerUnnestProjectionDropsLeftColumns
TestCase.Resource: SELECT a, s FROM MyTable, UNNEST(d) AS T(s)

LogicalProject(a=[$0], s=[$4]) +- LogicalCorrelate(correlation=[$cor0], joinType=[inner], requiredColumns=[{3}]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]]) +- LogicalProject(s=[$0]) +- Uncollect +- LogicalProject(d=[$cor0.d]) +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])

Calc(select=[a, d0 AS s]) +- Correlate(invocation=[$UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.d)], correlate=[table($UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.d))], select=[a,d,d0], rowType=[RecordType(INTEGER a, INTEGER ARRAY d, INTEGER d0)], joinType=[INNER]) +- Calc(select=[a, d]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]], fields=[a, b, c, d])

TestCase.name: testLeftUnnestFilterOnRightOnly
TestCase.Resource: SELECT a, s FROM MyTable LEFT JOIN UNNEST(d) AS T(s) ON TRUE WHERE s < 100

LogicalProject(a=[$0], s=[$4]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[<($4, 100)]) +- LogicalCorrelate(correlation=[$cor0], joinType=[left], requiredColumns=[{3}]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]]) +- LogicalProject(s=[$0]) +- Uncollect +- LogicalProject(d=[$cor0.d]) +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])

Calc(select=[a, d0 AS s], where=[<(d0, 100)]) +- Correlate(invocation=[$UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.d)], correlate=[table($UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.d))], select=[a,d,d0], rowType=[RecordType(INTEGER a, INTEGER ARRAY d, INTEGER d0)], joinType=[LEFT]) +- Calc(select=[a, d]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]], fields=[a, b, c, d])

TestCase.name: testLeftUnnestProjectionDropsLeftColumns
TestCase.Resource: SELECT a, s FROM MyTable LEFT JOIN UNNEST(d) AS T(s) ON TRUE

LogicalProject(a=[$0], s=[$4]) +- LogicalCorrelate(correlation=[$cor0], joinType=[left], requiredColumns=[{3}]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]]) +- LogicalProject(s=[$0]) +- Uncollect +- LogicalProject(d=[$cor0.d]) +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])

Calc(select=[a, d0 AS s]) +- Correlate(invocation=[$UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.d)], correlate=[table($UNNEST_ROWS$1($cor1.d))], select=[a,d,d0], rowType=[RecordType(INTEGER a, INTEGER ARRAY d, INTEGER d0)], joinType=[LEFT]) +- Calc(select=[a, d]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]], fields=[a, b, c, d])

TestCase.name: testUnnestWithOrdinalityFilterOnPos
TestCase.Resource: SELECT a, val, pos FROM MyTable CROSS JOIN UNNEST(d) WITH ORDINALITY AS T(val, pos) WHERE pos = 1

LogicalProject(a=[$0], val=[$4], pos=[$5]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[=($5, 1)]) +- LogicalCorrelate(correlation=[$cor0], joinType=[inner], requiredColumns=[{3}]) :- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]]) +- LogicalProject(val=[$0], pos=[$1]) +- Uncollect(withOrdinality=[true]) +- LogicalProject(d=[$cor0.d]) +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])

Calc(select=[a, val, pos]) +- Correlate(invocation=[$UNNEST_ROWS_WITH_ORDINALITY$1($cor1.d)], correlate=[table($UNNEST_ROWS_WITH_ORDINALITY$1($cor1.d))], select=[a,d,val,pos], rowType=[RecordType(INTEGER a, INTEGER ARRAY d, INTEGER val, INTEGER pos)], joinType=[INNER], condition=[=($1, 1)]) +- Calc(select=[a, d]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]], fields=[a, b, c, d])
